programme.title: Fast N' Loud: Dodge Hodge Podge Part 1/ '65 Mustang
programme.desc: Richard and Aaron pick up a '64 Dodge Sweptline that's a mishmash of parts. A '32 Ford Roadster Richard forgot he bought rolls in, but it's up to Christie to seal the deal with the prospective buyer. KC hits the road with Richard to buy a '65 Mustang.

programme.title: Fast N' Loud: Dodge Hodge Podge Part 2/ Oldsmobile Delta 88
programme.desc: The crew struggles to finish the '64 Dodge truck. Richard flips a '52 Chevy. He digs out an Oldsmobile Delta '88 he forgot he bought, but it's also not quite what he remembered. Broken brakes leave a dent in the garage door and Richard's wallet.

programme.title: Fast N' Loud: Ferrari Fix, Part 1/ Dead Head Bus
programme.desc: Richard, Aaron and the crew embark on the riskiest and most expensive build in Gas Monkey history.

programme.title: Fast N' Loud: Ferrari Fix, Part 2/ 1917 REO
programme.desc: The crew pushes to finish the Ferrari F40 and get it sold. Costs rise when the $8000 windshield gets broken. Richard's luck turns when the 1967 Porsche 911S he buys turns out to be something better. Tom better get crankin' on a 1917 REO or he'll be fired.

programme.title: Fast N' Loud: Model A Madness
programme.desc: Richard and Aaron look to make extra cash as the renovation cost for their 1931 Model A hot rod is adding up.

programme.title: Fast N' Loud: Monkey Business Dragster
programme.desc: The guys buy a gleaming '32 Pontiac at a swap meet. A friend's 1960 Cadillac Sedan De Ville might be haunted and cursing the garage.

programme.title: Fast N' Loud: Double Trouble Galaxie
programme.desc: The guys get a '64 Galaxie ready for auction. A 1949 F-1 Ford is stuck on a car hauler.

programme.title: Fast N' Loud: Low Riding Lincoln
programme.desc: Richard and Aaron turn a 1970 Lincoln Continental Mark III into a muscle car and picks up a 1970's style hot rod kit car with a mysterious past.

programme.title: Fast N' Loud: Fast and Furious Fairmont
programme.desc: An ugly 1978 Ford Fairmont is turned into a cool, mirrored drift car. Richard flips a rare 1967 Corvette Stingray.

programme.title: Fast N' Loud: Far-Out Fairlane
programme.desc: Richard and Aaron resurrect two cars bought from a local charity: a '59 Fairlaine 500 Galaxie and a 1954 Bel Air. Richard is concerned for his safety at a Model A boneyard, but it's having to reject one of Sue's jobs that has him and Aaron most concerned.

programme.title: Fast N' Loud: Mashed Up Mustang
programme.desc: Richard trades his friend a '58 Impala for a '67 Mustang. He flips a smoking '72 Pontiac Formula 400. Aaron and the crew rush to the scene of a Gas Monkey accident.

programme.title: Fast N' Loud: Stung by a '67 Corvette Stingray
programme.desc: Richard buys a 1973 Dodge Challenger and the holy grail of Corvettes, a 1967 Stingray in hopes of a six-figure sale.

programme.title: 90 Day Fiancé: The Other Way: Not on My Watch

programme.title: Cold Case Files: Cross Country Connection/ Eyes at the Window
programme.desc: DNA found on a marijuana joint in Florida in 2005 helps to solve the 1988 rape and murder of a California woman. A cold case murder in Illinois heats up when a jailhouse lawyer turns into a jailhouse snitch.

programme.title: Cold Case Files: Abandoned Houses/ A Son's Memory
programme.desc: Detectives are baffled when two young girls are raped, murdered and dumped in an abandoned house in Akron, Ohio. A 26-year-old mother of three disappears on Christmas Eve.

programme.title: Cold Case Files: A Knock at the Door/ Shattered
programme.desc: The killing of a woman in a Virginia hotel room goes unsolved for a quarter of a century before investigators are able to zero in on the likely killer. A 25-year-old woman is shot to death during a jewellery store robbery.

programme.title: Cold Case Files: Killings on Christmas Eve
programme.desc: A family torn apart by their grandparents' murders. Two decades later, a cold case detective takes on the case that's haunted him since he was a child. When he breaks the case, he must race to solve it before the family takes matters into their own hands.

programme.title: Cold Case Files: A Killer Slips Away
programme.desc: The loving aunt of a close-knit family was stabbed to death in her home and it took two decades for detectives to discover that a clue lay hidden in plain sight for 24 years.

programme.title: Cold Case Files: A Family Cursed
programme.desc: One family faces two unsolved murders of their loved ones. It takes 13 years for detectives to uncover the one missing clue that can lead them to the killer: the hidden crime scene.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Parent Trap
programme.desc: The guys get stuck in a grocery post-it showdown, and tonight's big loser earns a time-out for his outrageous behavior at a kids' play space.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: X Man
programme.desc: The guys compete in their first four-way challenge. Later, see what happens when they try to lead a kid's art class, and which loser fails so badly that he's hit with an on-the-spot punishment that leaves him seeing red.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Prize Fighter
programme.desc: Learn how the crew keeps their presence a secret in restaurants and which Joker used to attend team building seminars. Plus, find out what phony fees the Jokers came up with that didn't make the cut.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Dinner Party: The Childhood Meals Episode
programme.desc: Murr, Q, Sal and Joe eat a childhood meal with Colin Jost. Plus, Sal fools his mom into thinking she owes 20% of her produce to the government.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Dinner Party: The PB&J Episode
programme.desc: The guys dine and discuss their week. Find out who can make the best meal and how long Q's beard has become.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Dumbbell
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Q and Murr test their parental instincts by reading their daughters' diaries, then give presentations that are anything but normal. Later, tonight's big loser gets painfully honest with bodybuilders at the gym.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Prize Fighter
programme.desc: The guys get their checks bounced by customers who notice unusual charges, then help out coworkers with some peculiar trust exercises. Later, the big loser finds himself deep at a carnival game that's rigged for him to lose.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Sun-Fan Lotion
programme.desc: Murr, Q and Sal are at the massage parlor for much kneaded relaxation, and then ask strangers their opinions on questionable yearbook ads. Later, tonight's big loser has an awkward but fan-tastic time in the sun.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Bad Carma
programme.desc: Murr, Sal, Joe and Q showcase questionable products to participants, and then rescue strangers who don't need to be rescued. Later, the big loser must hit and run his mouth to get himself out of trouble.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Toll Booth Corrector
programme.desc: The guys pose as suspicious nutritionists trying to recruit clients, before quitting their jobs for strange reasons. Afterwards, the gang goes head-to-head in a wild debate judged by a stranger.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Closer
programme.desc: Q, Joe, Sal and Murr get tech help from some confused tutors, then play hot potato in a shoe store. Plus, the big loser wishes he could press 'escape' during a brutal coffee shop punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: It's Electric
programme.desc: The guys pitch whimsical TV show idea to focus groups and then go to the park with their 'daughters' who share unpopular opinions. The loser heads to the spa for an electrifying punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Off the Reservation
programme.desc: Murr, Q, Joe and Sal participate in a fake documentary, then find themselves in the middle of a marshmallow throwing contest. Plus, tonight's big loser is the host with the least when he can't find customers' dinner reservations.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Show Stopper
programme.desc: Sal, Q, Joe and Murr are at Universal Studios in Hollywood. They start off serving up ridiculous surveys, then make things awkward while posing as maintenance workers. Plus, tonight’s big loser can't catch a break…no matter how many times he tries.

programme.title: Top Secret Videos: Fitness Goals
programme.desc: Our interns examine surveillance videos, including a crocodile that breaks up a swimming pool hook-up and a bruising yacht dive fail.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Dinner Party: The Eggplant Parm Episode
programme.desc: Murr, Q, Sal and Joe dish out some wild stories with actress Jillian Bell and devour the perfect parmigiana cooked by Chef Dom Dibartolomeo.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Cake Loss
programme.desc: Q, Sal, Murr and Joe mean no disrespect to patrons at a food court, then cut to the chase while posing as tailors. Later, strangers pick sides in a wild debate, and tonight's big loser takes the cake with his crumby punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Bogey Man
programme.desc: The laughing gas flows freely when the guys pose as dental assistants. Later, they make headlines for all the wrong reasons, and get burned giving some campfire tips. Plus, tonight’s big loser scores a hole in none on the links.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Dover and Out
programme.desc: The guys survey employees with odd questions, and tonight's loser unveils a mural in a small town whose residents react with big city rage.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Stage Fright
programme.desc: The guys serve up raw deals at a pawn shop counter and try to convince strangers to give them hugs. Plus, tonight's loser performs his life story through song.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Fraudway
programme.desc: Q, Joe, Sal and Murr one-up each other while trying not to laugh, and team up for a lunch that’s for the birds. Later, tonight’s big loser hits the Broadway stage, where he’s treated to a classic New York welcome by an agitated crowd.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Dover and Out
programme.desc: The guys survey employees with odd questions, and tonight's loser unveils a mural in a small town whose residents react with big city rage.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Prehistoric Fossil Breeding
programme.desc: Michael schools a man on fish fossil breeding at a rock store and colours with his tongue at a paint store. Then, on a construction site, Michael and his helper dig up a skeleton that still has some life in it.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Vegan Plant
programme.desc: Michael feeds a cannibalistic plant at a garden center, and at the tuxedo store, he sells a tie that literally suits itself. Plus, at a hockey rink, Michael's assistant is speechless with a trick so electric it melts the ice.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Sorcery or Science
programme.desc: Michael sweetens a woman's day at a candy store when a chocolate bunny eats her ring, and at the stadium for the Chicago White Sox, he inflates pretzels at a snack stand. Plus, one of Michael's tricks gets flushed down the tubes.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Whose Phone Is Ringing?
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Q and Murr hit a bull's-eye at a clothing store, sabotage each other in a focus group, and the big loser is called upon at a book reading.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Centaur of Attention
programme.desc: The guys go head-to-head in a focus group, and then spread some confusion at a bagel store before heading to the park where they hit all the wrong notes. Finally, tonight's biggest loser gets hunted down during a truly humiliating walk of shame.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Inside Carbonaro: A Waddle, a Scratch ...
programme.desc: Find out the record for the most people Michael has tricked at once, where he gets his BS skills from, and how he puts his artistic abilities to use.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Inside Carbonaro: Just Smash It Out
programme.desc: Find out what props made our magic team nervous to purchase, what trick gave Michael freezer burn, and what Michael's favourite moment of the series is thus far.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Inside Carbonaro: The Lizard Law
programme.desc: Never before seen footage; a severed camera cable; the magic team messing with Michael during a trick.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Inside Carbonaro: Serious Deja Vu
programme.desc: The trick that Michael initially thought was too goofy. The trick that took nearly a week of rehearsals and tested Michael's memory.

programme.title: World's Dumbest...: Motorheads 8
programme.desc: Twenty of the dumbest drivers to ever turn an ignition. There's a backwards biker, a superhero stopped for speeding, and an extreme case of Russian road rage.

programme.title: World's Dumbest...: Motorheads 9
programme.desc: You'll see a passed out pilot, road rage rants, a nearly-too-hot-for-TV motorcycle ride, and a mail truck that delivers a hit. Keeping the show on the road is our celebrity cast.

programme.title: World's Dumbest...: Motorheads 10
programme.desc: Counting down the 20 most moronic motor heads ever caught on tape. You'll see a car cut in half, a bumper-loving pig, and a snow plow driver who makes vehicles disappear.

programme.title: World's Dumbest...: Motorheads 11
programme.desc: The 20 most hysterical motorheads on the road, in the sky, and on water. See an out-of-control mail truck, a wild road rager, and a man treating a motorbike like it's his girlfriend.

programme.desc: Jack is disappointed with Pete's lack of ambition and Tracy regains his sense of smell.

programme.title: 30 Rock: Meet the Woggles!
programme.desc: Liz tries to get Jack to have an important conversation with his mother.

programme.title: 30 Rock: Murphy Brown Lied to Us
programme.desc: Jack sets Liz up on a blind date to show her what she is missing by not being in a relationship.

programme.title: 30 Rock: Queen of Jordan 2: The Mystery of the Phantom Pooper
programme.desc: The launch of Angie Jordan's new clothing line brings 'Queen of Jordan' back to 'TGS,' but the cameras focus on Jack when news about his wife, Avery, forces him to confront his feelings for Diana.

programme.title: 30 Rock: The Return of Avery Jessup
programme.desc: Avery returns from South Korea and Jack suspects she is hiding something after she seems unmoved by the news of his indiscretions.

programme.title: 30 Rock: What Will Happen to the Gang Next Year?
programme.desc: Determined to prove his marriage has survived Avery's kidnapping unscathed, Jack asks Liz to officiate their vow renewal. Meanwhile, Criss tries to convince Liz that he's worth sticking around for.

programme.title: 30 Rock: The Beginning of the End
programme.desc: TGS returns from hiatus and Liz is alarmed by their terrible programming line-up. Jenna prepares to be the ultimate bridezilla and recruits Liz to be her maid of honor.

programme.title: 30 Rock: Governor Dunston
programme.desc: Jack is torn between business and politics while Liz tries to spice up her love life.

programme.title: 30 Rock: Stride of Pride
programme.desc: Liz has her hands full with both her stars as she tries to protect Jenna from some bad press and clashes with Tracy over an offensive tweet. Jack tests out a new dating technique.

programme.title: 30 Rock: Unwindulax
programme.desc: Liz and Jack find themselves in a standoff as Jenna goes to great lengths to please her new fan base.

programme.title: 30 Rock: There's No I in America
programme.desc: Realizing that Jenna could decide the Presidential election, Liz and Jack stage a debate to win her support and her followers.

programme.title: 30 Rock: Aunt Phatso vs. Jack Donaghy
programme.desc: Tracy and Jack engage in a battle of wits after Tracy depicts Jack as a villain. On Jack's advice, Liz puts her own needs ahead of those of 'TGS'. Meanwhile, Jenna tries to shield Kenneth from Hazel's manipulation but her selfishness gets in the way.

programme.title: 30 Rock: Mazel Tov, Dummies!
programme.desc: Liz and Criss decide to take drastic measures in order to start a family. Jack and Jenna evaluate their self worth.

programme.title: 30 Rock: My Whole Life Is Thunder
programme.desc: Jenna is furious at Liz for stealing her wedding thunder. Jack devises an elaborate plan to avoid disappointing his mother, while Tracy tries to cheer up Kenneth.

programme.title: 30 Rock: Game Over
programme.desc: Jack tries to discredit his teenage nemesis and Liz explores her options to become a mother.

programme.title: 30 Rock: Florida
programme.desc: Jack and Liz go off to Florida to handle Jack's late mother's estate. Meanwhile Tracy and Jenna take charge at 'TGS.'

programme.title: 30 Rock: A Goon's Deed in a Weary World
programme.desc: As she and Criss receive some unexpected family news, Liz tries to rally her staff to save 'TGS.' Tracy and Jenna start to plan for their careers beyond the show while Kenneth interferes with Jack's appointment of a new NBC president.

programme.title: 30 Rock: Hogcock!/ Last Lunch
programme.desc: Liz has difficulty adjusting to being a stay at home mom while Jack takes stock of his life. Tracy struggles without constant attention from Kenneth as the former page settles into his new job as president of NBC.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: A Very Merry Christmas
programme.desc: The Kardashians gear up for the holidays with their annual photo, and exchange gifts.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: The New Normal
programme.desc: Even though things are changing for the Kardashian family in ways they never expected, they are determined to remember that family always comes first.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Somewhere Over the Cuckoo's Nest
programme.desc: Kris starts dating someone after 25 years with Bruce, and no one is more critical than her daughters. Khloé ends up in hot water over a controversial Instagram post, and Kim gets a lesson in manners when she tries to recruit Kourtney for her video game.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: The Carfather
programme.desc: When Scott has a flurry of suspicious activity and vague business dealings, the family decides to pull back the curtain on Scott's man-of-mystery persona. Kris worries she's made a mistake with her living will; Kim stops Bruce from spending all his money.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: GGG Winners' Holiday Extravaganza
programme.desc: Four previous GGG winners are back for the holidays to take on more of Guy Fieri's games. First, the chefs must shop for ingredients using nothing but oversize stockings. Then, they're each given a gingerbread house to work with.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Judges' Holiday: Ultimate Naughty List
programme.desc: Guy Fieri brings four of GGG's most beloved judges to compete against each other using not-so-nice ingredients from his ultimate naughty list.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: GGG Holiday Cook-Off
programme.desc: 'Tis the season for giving in Flavortown when Guy Fieri brings in four charitable chefs to compete in a holiday cook-off. First, Guy hands out gifts of special ingredients that the chefs must feature in their holiday pork dish.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Guy's Holiday Dessert Games
programme.desc: Guy Fieri welcomes four pastry chefs for a holiday dessert version of his games. He gets things started by having the chefs turn a savory classic, ravioli, into a holiday favourite.

programme.title: Holiday Wars: Critter Christmas
programme.desc: Host Raven-Symone asks the four remaining teams of cake and sugar artists to create the most over-the-top, crazy visions of a Christmas party in the animal kingdom. Shinmin Li and Erin Acevedo judge these wild critter holiday parties.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Treacherous Trails
programme.desc: During a busy winter weekend, Lt. Boudreau encounters kite skiers, an illegal fire sled and a vandalized bob-house. Officer Canfield searches for a deer with an arrow in its head. Then, Officers Demler and Towne head our on a mountain rescue.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Protect and Preserve: Out of Options
programme.desc: Officer Cyrs gets a call about a rabid fox that attacked a homeowner. Officer Crouse tracks down a group of ATV riders. Lt. Murphy talks to a farmer about a nuisance bear. Officers Frye and Jones investigate a hunter that may have from shot the road.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Protect and Preserve: Bump in the Road

programme.title: North Woods Law: Protect and Preserve: Cracking a Cold Case

programme.title: Moonshiners: Hush Money

programme.title: Moonshiners: First Run
programme.desc: Tickle bootlegs at night, while Wayne comes up with an ingenious drop-off plan for his own bootleggers. Equipment failure threatens the production of Tim Smith's legal moonshine, and Josh and Bill finally begin their first run of strawberry brandy.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Evel Genius
programme.desc: Batter up with the Pawn Stars when an autographed photo of Babe Ruth slides into the shop. The guys take a peek at a collection of 400 antique prosthetic glass eyeballs.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Making Cents
programme.desc: The Pawn Stars consider sending a search party out for Chumlee when he takes off to look at a 1950's Bally's coin operated kiddie ride.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Three Hour Tour
programme.desc: A seller brings in rare $1 and $5 bills from the 1800s. Another seller brings in a Big Bang Cannon, which is a tiny toy that makes a loud noise. Later, a guy pings the shop with a memento given to sailors who sank the U-68 submarine.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Bullitt Proof
programme.desc: Check out a 1968 Ford Mustang GT fastback, just like the one they used in "Bullit." A guy moseys in with an 1858 Smith & Wesson Model 1, the same model used to kill Wild Bill Hickok.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Close, But No Cigar
programme.desc: Ask not what your Pawn Stars can do for you, when the guys get a chance to own JFK's personal cigar box.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Open and Shut Case
programme.desc: Fly high with the Pawn Stars when the guys check out a briefcase once owned by Charles Lindbergh.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Truly Trivial
programme.desc: The guys check out a motorcycle that was custom-built for actor James Caan. Then, an Al Hirschfeld lithograph is brought into the shop. Later, Chumlee tries to stump Rick with a trivia book that he found.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Magic Bus
programme.desc: Head back in time with the Pawn Stars when Rick checks out a fully restored 1960s VW Samba.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Tee'd Off
programme.desc: A USGA 'rules of golf book' from 1934 putts into the shop. Then, Rick checks out an organ owned by Steven Tyler. Later, Chumlee takes a big swing at golf after he and Corey make a wager.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: April Fooled
programme.desc: Corey checks out a Civil War era sword made by Tiffany & Co. Then, the old man sails down memory lane with some mementos from his former ship, the USS Chowanoc.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Pawn Fiction
programme.desc: A cast jacket from 'Pulp Fiction' is brought into the shop. Then, Corey goes solo when opera gloves signed by Hollywood legend Clark Gable are brought in. Later, Rick heads to Lonnie Hammargren's home to check out his collection of unique items.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Chum's Secret Stash
programme.desc: A 1907 Saint-Gaudens high-relief coin comes into the shop. Then, Rick is surprised when a pair of vintage Ray-Ban sunglasses arrives that supposedly belonged to George Bush Sr. Finally, Rick finds Chum's secret stash and has to explain what layaway means.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: A Pawn of Lies
programme.desc: Two original lithographs by graphic artist M.C. Escher; a censored recording made on a Soviet X-ray; a Wells Fargo model stagecoach; a 1950s toy lie detector.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Killer Pawn
programme.desc: A signed shower curtain by Anthony Perkins; an 1882 Gold Certificate and 1918 Federal Reserve note; an 1800s Millionaire Calculator; a 1950s Russian night vision scope.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Wound Up Rick
programme.desc: An autograph Led Zeppelin album; an antique whistle collection; a Doonesbury cartoon pencils; a self-winding clock.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Revolutionary Rick!
programme.desc: The 500th episode of the series finds Rick in the nation's capital. A set of silver spoons made by Paul Revere is a rare find. Back at 'Gold and Silver,' a conversational candle prop from 'H.R. Pufnstuf' creates intrigue.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Highly Explosive Pawn
programme.desc: It's all hands on deck when a British Navy gunpowder bucket blasts into the shop and a seller approaches the Pawn Stars to present them with a past prop from 'Back to the Future, Part II.'

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Blades of Deal
programme.desc: A 1984 Ferrari 308 is a find Rick can't wait to drive away with, provided he can make a deal. Corey examines a phone-operated music player that dates back to the 1930s. A cowboy hat formerly owned by Larry Hagman ('Dallas') has Rick excited.

programme.title: Movie: Sunday in New York

programme.desc: In this bizarre mid-western saga, a grudge between a shady District Attorney and an eccentric local student turns deadly. Dogged investigators work for decades to bring a quartet of brothers to justice.

programme.title: Dateline: Deadly Deceit

programme.title: Dateline: After the Storm
programme.desc: A beautiful woman is strangled to death in her large Austin, Texas home. Police look at the men in the victim’s life, while also considering this may have been a stranger. The murderer is caught and now he speaks to Dateline for the first time.

programme.title: NCIS: Los Angeles: Sacrifice

programme.title: NCIS: Los Angeles: Lone Wolf
programme.desc: The team investigates the murder of a former navy intelligence officer who had been living a double life and traveling overseas using false passports.

programme.title: NCIS: Los Angeles: Greed

programme.title: NCIS: Trapped

programme.title: NCIS: Burden of Proof

programme.desc: Neil Armstrong goes into an unexplained spin. He needs to figure out what's causing it, or he faces certain death. An Apollo 17 photo seems to show a U.S. military outpost on the moon. Could there be alien life swimming in the oceans of Jupiter's moons?

programme.title: NASA's Unexplained Files: A President's Close Encounter
programme.desc: Geysers are discovered on a frozen moon, and NASA redirects a probe on a daring mission to detect evidence of life. An unidentified object is spotted approaching a near-earth asteroid. A future US President is an eyewitness to a UFO.

programme.title: NASA's Unexplained Files: Mars's Deepest Secret
programme.desc: British astronomers working for the CIA intercept Soviet photos of the moon. A malfunction on the ISS could poison its crew with deadly ammonia gas. A startling image taken by a NASA probe points to evidence that life could exist on Mars.

programme.title: NASA's Unexplained Files: Ghosts on a Comet
programme.desc: When a Chinese moon rover breaks down, a NASA scientist points to a mysterious material that seemed to sabotage the Apollo missions decades earlier. The Rosetta spacecraft finds a comet that appears to be singing.

programme.title: NASA's Unexplained Files: Aliens vs. Stalin at Area 51
programme.desc: When a former Area 51 insider alleges that the Roswell UFO incident was a nefarious Soviet conspiracy masterminded by Stalin, experts investigate if it was indeed an enemy plot against America, or whether the confession is just another cover-up.

programme.title: NASA's Unexplained Files: Red Storm Rising
programme.desc: Two astronauts trapped in the vacuum of space face an agonizing death; the first close up images of Pluto reveal an alien landscape, and residents of Houston struggle to explain videos of unidentified flying lights captured above their city at night.

programme.title: NASA's Unexplained Files: Revenge of the Fireflies
programme.desc: NASA investigates so called space fireflies that are attacking the brains of astronauts.

programme.title: NASA's Unexplained Files: Interstellar Gold Rush
programme.desc: A distant planet shows evidence of an Earth-like atmosphere, while a mysterious glowing light suggests the impossible - an atmosphere on the Moon. Have we found evidence of a crashed alien ship on the asteroid belt and why are there blueberries on Mars?

programme.title: NASA's Unexplained Files: CIA's Secret Revenge
programme.desc: When the Soviet Union unveils its own space shuttle, the CIA hatches a secret revenge plot. Recent discoveries shed new light on the destruction of Sodom and Gomorrah. A missing nuclear weapon could threaten a NASA base in the Arctic.

programme.title: NASA's Unexplained Files: Curse of the Red Planet
programme.desc: Three cosmonauts die mysteriously as they re-enter Earth's atmosphere and NASA needs to know why. A declassified document reveals a CIA plan to use a space disaster as a cover to start World War 3. A NASA rover discovers clues that help solve a murder.

programme.title: NASA's Unexplained Files: Secret Aliens
programme.desc: An astronomer records an unusual radio signal from beyond our solar system. FBI agents find classified documents at the home of a NASA scientist. When scientists discover strange DNA in the octopus, they examine if their origins could be alien.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Death Before Dawn
programme.desc: In Orange County, California, screams of terror ring out from the home of multimillionaires. A series of clues lead the police on a hunt to find a wealthy couple's killer and bring justice to their five now orphaned children.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Without A Trace
programme.desc: In 1984 ten-year-old Kevin Collins disappears on his way home and the city of San Francisco is galvanized in an effort to find him. With few leads to go on, Kevin's case sheds light on hundreds of other kids who have vanished without a trace in the U.S.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Suburban Secrets
programme.desc: When doting mother, Cheryl Coker, vanishes from Riverside, Ohio on October 2nd 2018 numerous search efforts come up empty. But as police take a closer look at the case, they uncover some disturbing information.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn: Long Walk, Cold Night
programme.desc: When a teenage girl is found murdered after a night out with friend, Police must retrace her final steps to find her killer.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn: A Test of Patience
programme.desc: The unsolved murder of a teenager torments a small midwestern city for decades until a relentless team of investigators finally finds the clue that breaks the case wide open.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn: Crime and Injustice
programme.desc: The murder of a 19-year-old college student marks the beginning of one of the most tormenting investigations in US history, one that forced everyone involved to question the meaning of the word justice.

programme.title: To Be Announced
programme.desc: Programming to be announced.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn: A Predator in the Woods
programme.desc: Two young girls are lured into a deadly trap by a vicious sexual predator. One survives and helps police bring her best-friends killer to justice.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn: Crime and Injustice
programme.desc: The murder of a 19-year-old college student marks the beginning of one of the most tormenting investigations in US history, one that forced everyone involved to question the meaning of the word justice.

programme.title: To Be Announced
programme.desc: Programming to be announced.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn: In the Shadows of Home
programme.desc: The body of a teenager is found savagely murdered just steps from her home. When the investigation stalls police are approached by a brave young woman willing to risk her own safety to get justice.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn: As She Lay Dying
programme.desc: A young mother is viciously stabbed in broad daylight, her final words to police may hold the key to solving her murder.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: Let Her Rot
programme.desc: When Joshua Hudnall went off to war, he felt more at home in combat than he ever did around his mother. Just when Joshua thought he had escaped her torment, she set her sights on someone else, and destroyed their family from within.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: Son of the Prophet
programme.desc: Dennis Ryan grew up believing that his father's violent teachings were preparing him to save the lives of everyone in their farmhouse. But by the time Dennis discovers the horrible truth, it is too late-he has already gone too far.

programme.title: Home Sweet Homicide: In Cold Blood
programme.desc: When police discover Betty Sue Short murdered in her home, they notice disturbing similarities with another recent killing in the community of Kingsport, Tennessee.

programme.title: Home Sweet Homicide: Dangerous Liaisons
programme.desc: When Cody MacPherson moves to New Jersey to look for work, he falls in with a new group of friends. After a late night of partying, he disappears without a trace. Six months later, this missing persons investigation soon turns into a homicide.

programme.title: Home Sweet Homicide: The DC Mansion Murders
programme.desc: In one of the most exclusive neighborhoods in Washington, DC, police discover a gruesome murder scene amongst the charred ruins of a mansion.

programme.title: Murder Comes Home: He Made Me Do It
programme.desc: Lila Warwick is a loving and hands-on grandmother of eight whose door is always open for holidays, birthdays or for anyone in need of a helping hand.

programme.title: Murder Comes Home: Red Mustang
programme.desc: When 22-year-old LeAnne Martinez fails to pick up her daughter from her mother's house, her family worries. Her red Mustang is missing, and what they find inside her home will leave them forever scarred.

programme.title: Murder Comes Home: On Her Own
programme.desc: Native Swede, Marioara Shand, is setting out on her own in Taos, New Mexico, after a recent breakup. One day in July of 2002, police discover her body in a brutal, bloody scene inside her new home.

programme.title: Nightmare Next Door: Only the Good
programme.desc: In the quiet suburb of Cordova Tennessee, Jimmy McClain is living a good life as a teacher and coach at a local high school. Until an early February morning, police find him assassinated in his home.

programme.title: Nightmare Next Door: Sex, Money and Murder
programme.desc: Lance Herndon was living the American dream in Roswell GA, until the millionaire is found brutally murdered. While this upper class town is reeling from the vicious killing, behind the gates of their upscale communities – investigators find a twisted web.

programme.title: Nightmare Next Door: The Art of Murder
programme.desc: As 22 year old Kristin Huggins is about to make her artistic debut she suddenly disappears. Soon its clear that the painter from PA had a brush with disaster in nearby NJ. Despite their best efforts, it takes cops quite some time to catch her killer.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: Mistress of Death
programme.desc: Two women living next to each other since childhood descend into bitter conflict when the ex husband of one starts seeing the other. Add property issues to this toxic mix and the result is an act of shocking violence that engulfs all.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Fall of Berlin
programme.desc: Survivors recount the horrors and strength behind surviving such a merciless place and the shock of Allied soldiers as they discover the evil secret of Germany's concentration camps.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Hell in the Pacific
programme.desc: The brave men and woman who fought along the tides of the Pacific share their stories. Both Japanese and U.S. forces face off with an intense determination and will to survive.

programme.title: World War II in Color: Red Sun Rampant
programme.desc: On December 7th 1941, WWII changed dramatically as Japanese planes swooped in for a surprise attack on the U.S. Pacific Fleet in Pearl Harbour. A conflict that had been fought almost entirely in Europe was now to be fought worldwide.

programme.title: World War II in Color: Closing the Ring
programme.desc: By late summer 1944, the Allied forces in north-west Europe were thrusting towards the German border. Paris and Antwerp were liberated, but then supply problems brought the advance to a halt. Meanwhile, Stalin had halted his main thrust towards Berlin.

programme.title: Warrior POV: Beheading the Taliban
programme.desc: In Afghanistan in 2006, US Army Green Berets take on nearly 1000 Taliban fighters in one of the most intense battles of the War on Terror. Five years after the 9/ 11 attacks, Task Force 31 launches a full-scale attack on a hill called Sperwan Ghar.

programme.title: Warrior POV: Fallujah
programme.desc: Fallujah, Iraq's most volatile city, has become a haven for radical Muslim fighters from around the world. To root them out, the U.S. military unleashes Operation Phantom Fury. Soldiers and Marines engage the enemy in brutal urban combat.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Road to Burma
programme.desc: The Empire of Japan begins to conquer South East Asia. The Allies attempt to block the empire's aggressive expansion, but ruthless tactics by Japan only help to further their war effort.

programme.title: World War II in Color: The Island War
programme.desc: By the spring of 1943, the Pacific war had reached a turning point. The United States had stopped the Japanese advance, now it launched a two-pronged attack to drive it back. To achieve this, the U.S. Navy had to pioneer new forms of warfare.

programme.title: Warrior POV: Fallujah
programme.desc: Fallujah, Iraq's most volatile city, has become a haven for radical Muslim fighters from around the world. To root them out, the U.S. military unleashes Operation Phantom Fury. Soldiers and Marines engage the enemy in brutal urban combat.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Road to Burma
programme.desc: The Empire of Japan begins to conquer South East Asia. The Allies attempt to block the empire's aggressive expansion, but ruthless tactics by Japan only help to further their war effort.

programme.title: World War II in Color: The Island War
programme.desc: By the spring of 1943, the Pacific war had reached a turning point. The United States had stopped the Japanese advance, now it launched a two-pronged attack to drive it back. To achieve this, the U.S. Navy had to pioneer new forms of warfare.

programme.title: Warrior POV: Beheading the Taliban
programme.desc: In Afghanistan in 2006, US Army Green Berets take on nearly 1000 Taliban fighters in one of the most intense battles of the War on Terror. Five years after the 9/ 11 attacks, Task Force 31 launches a full-scale attack on a hill called Sperwan Ghar.

programme.title: World War II in Color: Closing the Ring
programme.desc: By late summer 1944, the Allied forces in north-west Europe were thrusting towards the German border. Paris and Antwerp were liberated, but then supply problems brought the advance to a halt. Meanwhile, Stalin had halted his main thrust towards Berlin.

programme.title: World War II in Color: Red Sun Rampant
programme.desc: On December 7th 1941, WWII changed dramatically as Japanese planes swooped in for a surprise attack on the U.S. Pacific Fleet in Pearl Harbour. A conflict that had been fought almost entirely in Europe was now to be fought worldwide.

programme.title: Manhunt: Kill or Capture: The Devil Incarnate
programme.desc: Born in Honduras, Juan Ramon Matta Ballesteros became one of the richest cocaine smugglers in history. Ballesteros masterminded a supply route into the US, which fed much of the cocaine and crack epidemic of the 70's and 80's.

programme.title: Manhunt: Kill or Capture: Pablo Escobar: King of Cocaine
programme.desc: Pablo Escobar was the most feared drug dealer in the world. As head of the infamous Medellin cartel he flooded the USA with cocaine and terrorised the South American nation of Colombia. He met his match in a DEA agent who just wouldn't quit.

programme.title: Manhunt: Kill or Capture: Mexican Godfather
programme.desc: The hideously mutilated body of a DEA agent sparks the largest manhunt in the Drug Enforcement Administration's history. It would take a special unit of investigators, and a battalion of Mexican soldiers to bring the killers to justice.

programme.title: WWII's Greatest Raids: Rangers Lead the Way
programme.desc: United States Army Rangers spearhead one of the biggest amphibious landings in history: the Allied invasion of France. They must scale vertical cliffs before facing the enemy, then destroy the guns that threaten to blow the Allied forces out of the water.

programme.title: WWII's Greatest Raids: Mountain Massacre
programme.desc: The Black Devils, a joint American-Canadian mountain warfare unit, are about to go into action. They must mount a do-or-die night-time assault up a treacherous mountain, in extreme weather, to take on heavily-entrenched battle hardened German defenses.

programme.title: WWII's Greatest Raids: Hitler's Last Bridge
programme.desc: A brave band of regular GI's are tasked with saving the last bridge and final gateway to the Third Reich. The bridge is bristling with German guns loaded with explosives. Worse, the enemy plan to destroy the bridge if the American unit assaults it.

programme.title: Ultimate Warfare: Hue: Vietnam's Bloodiest Battle
programme.desc: In a final showdown marines must breech the heavily fortified walls of the ancient citadel where thousands of NVA soldiers lie in wait. After one of the bloodiest battles of the entire Vietnam War, the marines are finally victorious.

programme.title: Ultimate Warfare: Kandahar: Against All Odds
programme.desc: 36 U.S Special Forces face a Taliban insurgence 5 times their size. Facing I.E.Ds , RPG's and vicious counter attacks, they fight for their lives to take the hill of Sperwan Ghar, as control of the hill is control of Kandahar.

programme.title: Ultimate Warfare: Khe Sanh: Marines Under Siege
programme.desc: Six thousand outnumbered marines fight for survival against a vast, highly trained Communist army in a bloody 77 day siege. It's a battle that will shape the course of the war in Vietnam.

programme.title: Ultimate Warfare: Fallujah: The Taking of Terror Central
programme.desc: Operation Phantom Fury was meant to be a 48 hour battle but insurgents, armed with IEDs and a stockpile of grenades, fought back. US forces faced one of the toughest urban conflicts since Vietnam as they tried to reclaim the city.

programme.desc: A couple with five children calls on the Cabin Masters to take their newly purchased camp on David Pond and turn it into a family vacation cabin that will serve as a central part of their lives for generations to come.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Most Challenging Builds
programme.desc: This week the Cabin Masters take a look back and count down the top ten Most Challenging Builds.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: A Cabin for Future Generations
programme.desc: Mary wants the Cabin Masters to re-imagine the current footprint of the camp, and create additional bedroom/sleeping space while expanding the bathroom to accommodate their large family.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Top Ten Waterfront Cabins
programme.desc: Builder Chase Morrill teams up with his family to save and transform abandoned cabins.

programme.title: Building Alaska
programme.desc: Alaska's railroads, bridges and highways make a once impossible environment accessible for all.

programme.title: Building Alaska
programme.desc: Alaska's railroads, bridges and highways make a once impossible environment accessible for all.

programme.title: Building Alaska: Knock This Thing Out
programme.desc: As winter barrels down on Alaska, the builders scramble to complete their heating systems. Chappie must climb an extremely tall ladder to cut a hole in his roof while Jeff and his friend Andy build a hearth and Chris fixes a leak in his chimney.

programme.title: Building Alaska: Sky's the Limit
programme.desc: As the final days of their builds approach, the builders work to complete their cabins. Jeff Erickson helicopters in the remaining furniture for his cabin, and Chris Sewell's team works hard through the night to get the interior floors installed.

programme.title: The Vanilla Ice Project: Sealing The Deal
programme.desc: Every inch of this house has been fully updated, customized and improved. It's a beautiful space perfect for entertaining, relaxing, or just having fun. This home keeps it real and at the end of the day, that's what seals the deal.

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: Blown-out Beach House
programme.desc: A family with many fond memories of summer vacations in their Lewes, Delaware, beach house finds that their cottage's awkward layout isn't working. The space is maximized by vaulting the ceiling as well as adding an open-concept ground floor.

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: Rare and Recycled
programme.desc: A determined couple has found a 1960s gem of a beach home with a rare design element: a unique breezeway running through its center. The couple is serious about preserving its classic look and expanding upon the unique breezeway.

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: From Soaked to Saved
programme.desc: A couple has invested in a 50-year-old abandoned home in Dewey Beach, Delaware. They decide to hand the reins over to Marnie in the hopes she'll turn the fixer-upper into a safe vacation destination for their two boys.

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: Big Beach Dreams
programme.desc: Marnie's friend Leslie has achieved her dream of buying a beautiful house on the beach, but it needs a lot of work. Now she needs Marnie's help to turn it into the beach home and entertaining hub she's always dreamed about.

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: Pie-shaped Problem House
programme.desc: A couple loves to host family at their home in Dewey Beach, DE, but no one wants to stay in their tiny, awkwardly shaped guest house. With a limited budget, Marnie gets creative and bold with her design choices to transform the house.

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: Captain's Paradise
programme.desc: A former ship captain and his wife decide to buy a classic beach cottage a block away from the water. The location is perfect but the interior of the home has structural and layout flaws.

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: Beauty and the Beach
programme.desc: A townhouse overlooking Bethany Beach is dated and awkward. Marnie attempts to update the home, but the discovery of water damage may affect her ability to make the most of its dazzling view.

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: Seaside Spectacular
programme.desc: A family living in their dream location of Bethany Beach, DE, calls on Marnie to save their cramped 1980s beach house. Marnie's mission is to drag it into the present with a nautical makeover and make it look as beautiful as the beaches around it.

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: Backyard Beauty
programme.desc: Being close to the water in South Bethany, Delaware means unwanted wear and tear on Jay and Christine's back deck. They enlist Marnie to update and renovate the space.

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: The Beach Gut
programme.desc: A couple transports a 60-year-old house to a plot of land near the beach in the hopes it can be transformed into the perfect beach getaway. Marnie must renovate the home while keeping its rustic charm from the 1960s.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Kids' Dream Lake House
programme.desc: Chase Morrill and his team help a DIY homeowner jumpstart his project and renovate with kids in mind. With a budget of $30,000 and a July 1st deadline, the masters are going to have to use their imagination on this one.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: It Takes a Village
programme.desc: Founded in 1935, Agassiz Village has provided underprivileged and at-risk kids an opportunity to experience camp. Chase and his team take on a big project with a small budget to help the camp with the support of the community.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: A Family Gathering Place
programme.desc: Chase and his team take on a project on McGrath Pond in Oakland, ME, that has been empty for 15 years. Stephanie bought this place from her father and promised him she would fix it up.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: A Changing of the Guard's Camp
programme.desc: Recently Jeff and his wife Leah inherited the cabin he grew up in from his mother but it has been dormant for nearly 10 years and needs some major repairs and upgrades.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Columbus, Ohio
programme.desc: Casey Webb's countrywide edible expedition brings him to Columbus, Ohio. His massive meals include a bacon-wrapped hot dog with a crazy combination of toppings and a footlong chicken burrito blanketed in ghost pepper sauce.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Providence, Rhode Island
programme.desc: Adam visits Providence, Rhode Island for a unique grilled pizza and for the infamous Triple Murder Burger. Adam's journey concludes with him coaching a rugby player through 15 fully loaded hot wieners in 45 minutes.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Louisville, Ky
programme.desc: Casey Webb travels to Louisville, Kentucky, for some epic eats, including a booze-infused Southern staple and a one-of-a-kind spicy popcorn and frozen hot chocolate challenge in nearby Santa Claus, Indiana.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Portland, OR
programme.desc: Casey heads to Portland, Oregon, to taste mouth-watering Peruvian chicken, a succulent porchetta sandwich and a two-pound burrito packed with ten of the spiciest peppers in the world.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Hall of Fame: Decadent Desserts
programme.desc: Casey's sojourn of sustenance has had no shortage of sweets, and now it's time to celebrate the best of the best. We're counting down the most decadent desserts in Man vs. Food history and inducting them into our Hall of Fame.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Hall of Fame: Grill Masters
programme.desc: Armed with a serious love of food and years of experience in the restaurant business, Casey Webb travels the country in search of America's most delicious dishes and ultimate eating challenges.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Close Encounters Of The Food Kind
programme.desc: Noah Cappe is hot on the trail of some otherworldly carnival eats at the UFO Festival in Roswell.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Planet of the Funnel Cakes
programme.desc: Noah Cappe drops in on central California's Placer County Fair, the home of some one-of-a-kind fair foods.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Grill Bill
programme.desc: Noah Cappe travels to the Great Lakes to visit the Barry County Fair.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Fry Harder
programme.desc: Noah Cappe soaks up the California sunshine while enjoying some wacky West Coast treats at the San Diego County Fair in Del Mar, California.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: The Postman Always Brings Rice
programme.desc: Host Noah Cappe heads to Hawaii for the Maui Fair where rice is always on the menu. He enjoys traditional Hawaiian treats like the Laulau Feast and Loco Moco and cross-cultural favs like Furikake Salmon.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Pepper Popper Party
programme.desc: Noah Cappe challenges carnival concessionaires across America to feature everyone's favorite spicy bar snack in their offerings. From hot dogs and burgers to pizza and onion rings, even a dessert, these pepper popper creations are on fire.

programme.title: Yum and Yummer: More Cheese, Please
programme.desc: With so many different styles and flavors, cheese is incredibly versatile. Eddie Jackson finds there's no wrong way to go as he heads out on a creamy, tangy, cheesy ride.

programme.title: Yum and Yummer: Endless Pasta-bilities
programme.desc: There's something about pasta that's exciting, and Eddie Jackson shares a combination of savory sauces and a variety of textures for this ever-evolving ancient dish. No matter what, pasta has endless pasta-bilities!

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Let's Do Lunch
programme.desc: Ali Khan makes a beeline for an over-the-top pistachio chicken salad creation in Austin, Texas.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Steak Out
programme.desc: We're paying tribute to the best styles, cuts and steakhouses serving up the best steaks. Chef Jonathon Sawyer takes us on a trip to Dayton for a ribeye cut so incredibly, it's fit for a king.

programme.title: Southern and Hungry: A Whole Beast of Flavor
programme.desc: Damaris Phillips and NASCAR personality Rutledge Wood sop up the sauce in Charleston, S.C., as they discover the pleasures of whole hog barbecue with legendary pitmaster, Rodney Scott. Then they are on to one of the best burgers in America.

programme.title: Southern and Hungry: Southern Comforts Are Just Around the Corner
programme.desc: Southern food gets schooled when Damaris Phillips and NASCAR personality Rutledge Wood.

programme.title: The Bobby and Damaris Show: Getting Grilled
programme.desc: Nobody is more obsessed with grilling than Chef Bobby Flay, and Damaris Phillips loves a good backyard barbecue. Damaris mixes cool mango bellinis as they share their secrets for great backyard entertaining. Bobby then makes Mediterranean grilled chicken.

programme.title: Brunch @ Bobby's: New Diner Favorites
programme.desc: Chef Bobby Flay dresses up classic diner dishes like chocolate hazelnut s'more French toast, baked pumpkin oatmeal with a cinnamon crisp and an anything-goes style pasta scramble with breakfast sausage, eggs, kale and tomatoes.

programme.title: Brunch @ Bobby's: Brunch in Bloom
programme.desc: Chef Bobby Flay prepares a garden fresh menu using his favorite fruits, vegetables and herbs like strawberry waffles with lemon curd cream, an open faced omelet with herb cream cheese topped with smoked salmon and grilled asparagus.

programme.title: Brunch @ Bobby's: Breakfast in Bed
programme.desc: Chef Bobby Flay is preparing a 'breakfast in bed' style brunch. Bobby wines and dines in bed with an indulgent menu of baked eggs with prosciutto, candied tomatoes and herb parmesan cream, and chocolate covered berries.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Bacon Knows Best
programme.desc: In Las Vegas, Nev., Michael Symon takes down a towering fortress of succulent ribs and a sandwich that's a meaty trifecta of juicy brisket, pork and sausage.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Scary Good Smoked Meat
programme.desc: In San Diego, Michael Symon chows down on fish tacos with housemade blue corn tortillas and a meaty Mexican pizza. In Denver, a local Colorado lamb patty is a remake of a traditional Hawaiian hangover cure, the Loco Moco.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Southern, Spicy and Sweet
programme.desc: Bobby Flay makes a surprise guest appearance as Michael visits an over-the-top barbecue joint in New York with a one-of-a-kind brontosaurus beef rib. In Nashville, local tradition is hot chicken, Michael pushes his personal limit.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Beers, Burgers and Bocce in Baltimore
programme.desc: Actor and proud Baltimore native Josh Charles meets up with Michael at his favourite place for crab cakes in a town where everyone fights over where to find the very best. Then, they have a heated round of bocce ball in the Little Italy neighborhood.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: From Livestock to Lemons
programme.desc: Noah Cappe gets a lesson in the meat that makes Texas famous, sampling the Texas chili burger and the big Texas barbecue baked potato. Then he tries a local legend's tamale recipe before rounding off the day with strawberry waffle bombs.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: A Guac to Remember
programme.desc: Noah Cappe takes the west coast by storm, starting with the Pacific National Exhibition in Vancouver. He gorges on the Big Pickle Dog, then stands at attention for the Colonel Katsu Bao, an Asian-inspired chicken taco.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: From Renaissance to Rio Grande
programme.desc: Young squire Noah Cappe tries his hand at making the King's Court Conch fritters, decadent deep fried peanut butter and jelly brownie bites, a picquant fried green tomato BLT and the cookies and cream sandwich.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Get Him to the Greek Pizza
programme.desc: Noah Cappe's first stop is The Big Butler Fair in Butler, Penn., where he dines on a Euro-fusion Greek pizza, a crabby patty burger and a deep-fried chili dog, before finally tasting a fluffernutter elephant ear pasty.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Return of the Mac
programme.desc: Noah Cappe digs in to seven ooey-gooey versions of the classic American casserole. Whether it's stacked in a sandwich, layered in a hot dog, rolled into a taco or topped with lobster, these mac and cheese creations are crave-worthy carnival treats.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Cheese Please!
programme.desc: Noah Cappe is back for seconds of his seven favourite melty, ooey-gooey carnival treats. From the savoury truffled grilled cheese at the St. Paul Winter Carnival.

programme.title: Man v. Food Nation: Indianapolis, IN
programme.desc: Casey Webb travels to Indianapolis to battle a beast of a tenderloin sandwich. Along the way, he chows down on 38-ounces of succulent prime rib at a 100-year-old steakhouse and enjoys a tasty farm-fresh twist on macaroni and cheese.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Wilmington, North Carolina
programme.desc: Casey Webb's cross-country culinary adventures take him to the port city of Wilmington, North Carolina, for a barbecue bonanza, a totally bonkers burrito and a big, bad behemoth in the undefeated Pierogi Team Challenge.

programme.title: The Battle of Britain

programme.desc: Freddy's status as the best hide-and-seeker is challenged after he and Pip lose to a baby fox. Pip and Freddy help K.C. earn her first Golden Feather on Cleaning Day.

programme.desc: Candace is determined to win this year's father-daughter obstacle course, but unfortunately, Lawrence finds Agent P's lair and his memory is accidentally erased by a gadget.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Wednesday's Child

programme.title: Movie: Random Acts of Christmas
programme.desc: Investigating random acts of Christmas around her city, a young journalist meets a competing reporter who sparks her Christmas spirit.

programme.title: Movie: A Sweet Christmas Romance
programme.desc: When food stylist Holly returns home for Christmas, she learns that Loretta, the elderly owner of her favorite childhood bakery, is retiring and has started a contest to give the bakery away.

programme.title: How It Really Happened: The Death of Michael Jackson
programme.desc: Revelations of what Michael Jackson's children and staff witnessed prior to his death, and an investigation into the claims that Jackson took his own life.

programme.title: How It Really Happened: George Michael's Final Days
programme.desc: George Michael's life as international super star came to a mysterious and tragic end on Christmas Eve 2016. Family and fans were shocked by his sudden death. What happened the night he died?

programme.title: How It Really Happened: Prince: The End
programme.desc: Uncovering the secret struggles the music genius faced, from Prince's early years to the final days leading up to his shocking death.

programme.title: How It Really Happened: The Final Days of Whitney Houston
programme.desc: New details surrounding Whitney Houston's last days and her tumultuous relationship with Bobby Brown are revealed.

programme.title: How It Really Happened: Selena: Fatal Encounter
programme.desc: Go behind the scenes of Selena's red-hot career, ambitions and tragic demise. Rare interviews include her close friend and co-fashion designer, the back-up in her band, and a nurse who spoke to Selena and ger killer just before she died.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Welcome Intrusion
programme.desc: Years after a man is hailed for shooting the man who allegedly criminally harassed him and murdered his wife after breaking into their home, new technologies force the police to reassess the case. A tragic tale soon becomes even more tragic in a new way.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Within Arm's Reach
programme.desc: A man accused of killing his estranged wife insists she committed suicide.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Bad Medicine
programme.desc: A woman becomes critically ill, leaving her unable to walk. As her symptoms worsen, she gets a bone marrow test. The results reveal arsenic. Investigators now have to determine if she was poisoned by water contamination, or something far more sinister.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Stick 'em Up
programme.desc: When a bank president is found floating in a nearby lake, taped to a chair, forensic experts start piecing together the tape and discover a missing piece. It's this piece, and tips pouring in from residents, that will lead to a capture.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Badge of Betrayal
programme.desc: With no suspects or motives, investigators can't make sense of a murder when a young woman is found dead near the highway. A tiny piece of unique fibre on the victim's clothing will lead to the most unlikely killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Deadly Matrimony
programme.desc: A young woman claims to need some time away on her own. After 20 years go by, her family begins to believe they will never know what happened to her, until one day they receive a phone call that will alter everything.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Chief Evidence
programme.desc: A couple was murdered during what looked like a drug deal gone awry. But police found no drugs in the home of the victims and there were no traces of the victims' blood on the clothing of the suspects. The victim's dog eventually led police to the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Bitter Pill to Swallow
programme.desc: A pregnant woman experiences severe morning sickness and suspects something is amiss.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sip of Sins
programme.desc: Faryion Wardrip seemed like the model citizen to most, but he was also a brutal serial killer who, for years, eluded police without suspicion. But smart police work and DNA from a discarded paper cup proved to be Wardrip's undoing.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Telltale Tracks
programme.desc: Police found an abandoned car on the highway and assumed the driver had been the victim of a car-jacking. When they find the victim's body, unusual marks on her body lead to her killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Bed of Deceit
programme.desc: When a retired police officer is found shot dead in his bed, investigators suspect suicide. But the evidence, alongside surveillance tape from a nearby bank, seems to indicate it was murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Smoke in Your Eyes
programme.desc: The bodies of two young women are found in the ashes of an apartment fire, which appears to have been set deliberately.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Flower Power
programme.desc: Two different men call police to report the same murder. Apparently, neither one knew that the other had called.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Past Lives: The Madison Rutherford Case
programme.desc: The body of a wealthy American businessman is found in his rental car. When the victim's wife files a claim for $7 million of life insurance, investigators seek the help of a forensic anthropologist and uncover a chilling scheme of fraud and deceit.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Shopping Spree
programme.desc: A mother and her daughter leave home for a day of shopping, but never return. The little girl's body was found dumped off of a roadside, but there was no sign of her mother. Forensic science determined if the baby's mother was a suspect or a victim.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Cheater
programme.desc: Little did Walter Scott of the band 'Bob Kuban and the In-Men' know that their 1966 hit-single 'The Cheater' would foreshadow the events that would lead to his demise.

programme.title: Real Life Nightmare: Vanished From the Crib
programme.desc: Baby Lisa Irwin goes missing from her crib in the middle of the night. Stolen cell phones and a disturbing debit card charge on the parent’s account only adds to the mystery.

programme.title: Death Row Stories: The Wrong Man

programme.title: Death Row Stories: Body of Evidence

programme.title: Death Row Stories: Death, Lies and Videotape
programme.desc: The execution-style killings of a Florida nightclub owner and two aspiring models are caught on camera.

programme.title: Death Row Stories: Ride to the Rescue
programme.desc: A Sacramento law student is convicted after a brutal home invasion and murder. Her cause seems lost until Joyce Ride, mother of Sally Ride, becomes intrigued with the case.

programme.title: Death Row Stories: Forensics By Fire
programme.desc: Did Daniel Dougherty commit murder by arson, or did the fire science used to convict him get it wrong?

programme.title: Fast N' Loud: Ferocious Ford and Fast Ferrari
programme.desc: The Gas Monkey crew turn a rat-infested '38 Ford into a cool hot rod. Richard buys football player Emmitt Smith's Mercedes, which comes with a surprise. Richard gambles $400K on a banged up Ferrari F-40.

programme.desc: Once again, Richard and Aaron stall the crazy, roadtripping Aussies with Texas hospitality while the crew races to finish a 59 Bonneville they were given only 72 hrs to fix up. To get some more cash for the job, Richard picks up two mini cars from a nest.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Fastest in America: Texas vs Kentucky Pt 1
programme.desc: Teams Texas and Wyoming have been gunning for each other ever since Varni and Sherrybeth clashed in Wyoming. Tonight, they finally get their chance to battle and both teams are ready to pull out all the stops to make it to the next round $20,000 richer.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Full Throttle: Texas vs Kentucky Pt 2
programme.desc: With added scenes and bonus features: Kentucky is down but they're ready pull out a few extra tricks as their battle against team Texas rages on.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Fastest in America: Black Sheep vs. South Carolina
programme.desc: A newly formed team from South Carolina has formed under Chris Block and they're ready to battle with Brent Self and his Black Sheep Mafia. After Block's team suffers an internal struggle, the score is settled in a night of grudge racing.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Full Throttle: Texas vs Kentucky Grudge Night
programme.desc: With added scenes and bonus features: Lizzy Musi hits the streets in Aftershock to find some grudge racing. Meanwhile, Black Sheep Mafia sets out to prove to South Carolina that they're not underdogs.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Gone A-Rye
programme.desc: Shiners attempt to stay off the grid as the outside world encroaches on the backwoods. Tim breaks the news about the fate of Climax Moonshine. Jeff, Mark and Lance search for a new site before rivals can grab hold of the market.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Still Life
programme.desc: Josh and Bill find themselves with no still, no home base and no shine. Mark and Digger enlist a whiskey legend to find out why their first run went awry. Mark, Jeff and Lance undertake construction on an ambitious still site.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Rain or Shine
programme.desc: Weeks into moonshine season, Josh and Bill race to finish their still site and make their first run. Intruders interrupt Mark and Digger's rye test. A deadly disaster leaves Tim rattled and rethinking his plans to expand.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Scotch on the Rocks
programme.desc: It's one step forward and two steps back for Josh and Bill as they near the completion of their bunker. After losing a batch of mash, Jeff, Mark and Lance are $6000 in the hole as they begin making their highland scotch.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Six Feet Undercover
programme.desc: With a revolutionary still pot design and the help of Jim Tom, Mark and Digger have crafted 150 gallons of brandy. Now the duo must get their shine into the hands of their waiting customers.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Out on a Limb
programme.desc: In North Carolina a behemoth threatens to undo months of construction for Josh and Bill. A nocturnal prowler threatens Patti and David's clandestine operation and battle lines are drawn in Kentucky as Chico and Tyler clash over creative differences.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Trouble Brewing
programme.desc: With summer winding down, shiners are doubling their efforts to turn a quick profit. Tim Smith traverses the Atlantic on his quest to dominate the international shine market, but his pitch could be lost in translation.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Caved In
programme.desc: After coming to blows with Bill, Josh fears he may have finally gone too far. Patti and David aim to make up for lost time with a scorching new brew, but alarm bells have them running for the hills.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Cherry Bounce
programme.desc: It's the final weeks of summer and shiners are putting it all on the line. Tim must create a way to fill a massive international order and its judgment day in Virginia as Tickle puts on a brave face for court.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Shine 'Til You Drop
programme.desc: The stakes get higher as shine season nears its end. Mark and Digger leave disaster behind for a new still site as Patti and David's jalapeno whiskey drives them to sell in unfamiliar territory.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Still Regretting
programme.desc: Josh is down his right hand and his right hand man. Snags at the distillery have production at a halt and Tim's future in jeopardy. Chico and Sandra set out on horseback for some mountain shining. Patti and David rush to run before hunting season begins.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Virgin Whiskey

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: When Cows Attack
programme.desc: The Raney family arrives at a homestead threatened by heat, coyotes and even cows. Yes, cows. Disaster strikes when Marty attempts to protect livestock with a massive build, and the race is on to finish the project before father Paul must leave for work.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: The Bears and the Bees
programme.desc: The Raney family arrives at a homestead with a bee-obsessed owner unintentionally attracting bears with his hives. Marty bush-engineers a windmill to pump water to a new bathhouse, but the dangerous North Carolina wind threatens progress.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Ozark Mountain Misery
programme.desc: The Raney family goes to the Ozarks, where Marty spent his childhood homesteading, and discovers a malnourished couple and a mouldy cabin that's making them sick. Massive electric storms hit, but the homestead must be built before Mother Nature wins.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Methane Meltdown
programme.desc: The Raneys have a challenge on their hands as they try to restore a couple's failed homestead in Ohio. Marty's only hope is an old gas well, which if he can get working, can breathe life back into the homestead.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Survival Shelter: Fight Against the Flames
programme.desc: Raging California wildfires force the Raneys to give a masterclass on how to rebuild from scratch. Later, the Raneys use all new ingenuity to build a safe and structured space for a family's vulnerable livestock and cabin on the verge of collapse.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off The Deep End XL: For the Love of Paradise
programme.desc: In Florida, the crew is on a mission to transform a family's outdoor space into a Costa Rican-inspired jungle backyard. Later, Lucas builds a Mediterranean-inspired mini resort with a Caribbean twist for a client's wedding anniversary.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Survival Shelter: Fight Against the Flames
programme.desc: Raging California wildfires force the Raneys to give a masterclass on how to rebuild from scratch. Later, the Raneys use all new ingenuity to build a safe and structured space for a family's vulnerable livestock and cabin on the verge of collapse.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off The Deep End XL: Giant Grotto and Tranquil Temple
programme.desc: Lucas is challenged with two builds for two very different clients. One wants a giant grotto, complete with a waterfall, while the other wants a quiet backyard retreat.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Green With Envy
programme.desc: Lucas and the crew have their work cut out for them as a client's demands leave him reluctant. A Caribbean destination that includes green rocks and a sand bottom salt-water pool is the client's request.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Growing Pains
programme.desc: A couple hires Lucas to take their outdated pool and remodel so it's safe for their baby boy. The hope is that the dull patio pool will be transformed into a stunning natural atrium.

programme.title: Yukon Men: The Black Wolf
programme.desc: A wolf pack continues to encroach. Charlie's only option is to pursue the pack leader. Joey deals with consequences of Alaska's unusually warm winter and turns to his dad for help. Nations thinks the Moore's mushing team is running with the wrong leader.

programme.title: Yukon Men: On Thin Ice
programme.desc: Stan has the dangerous task of building an ice road across the Yukon River. Joe and Bob take their chances to embark on a perilous caribou hunt. Charlie confronts Nations about his trapline neglect. Pat and Courtney are faced with an alarming discovery.

programme.title: Yukon Men: Gut Check
programme.desc: The pressure is on Nations when the Moores head out for the first major dog sled race of the season. Stan faces a hard decision when one of his dogs falls ill. Charlie has had enough once he sees the state of the trapline he handed over to Nations.

programme.title: Yukon Men: Tanana's Test
programme.desc: Stan and Pat race to prepare Tanana to be a checkpoint for the Iditarod dog sled race. Charlie and Bob hunt a grizzly that has been terrorizing a miner's camp. Joe trains his new dog, hoping to turn him into a hunting partner.

programme.title: Yukon Men: Life on the Line
programme.desc: Nations and Charlie have a confrontation over rights to a family trapline. Stan and Kathleen try to upgrade Tozi cabin, but get more than they bargained for. The Moore's kennel is on the line as Courtney and Nations race in the Yukon River Championship.

programme.title: Yukon Men: Blood on Their Hands
programme.desc: After a poor trapping season, Charlie Wright teams up with Stan Zuray in a last-ditch effort to catch beaver. Stan and Joe Zuray discover a large predator has been stealing from their trapline. James Roberts teaches his two sons the importance of hunting.

programme.title: Yukon Men: All In
programme.desc: Unseasonably thin ice prevents villagers from reaching valuable hunting grounds, forcing Stan and Charlie to carve a new path through the rugged Alaskan wilderness in search of food. Desperate to provide for his family, James takes a huge risk.

programme.title: Yukon Men: Breaking Point
programme.desc: The Yukon River breaks up earlier than ever. Despite dangerous conditions, Joey crosses the river to hunt geese. Stan and Bob prepare the village for imminent flooding due to the break up, when they realize someone is stuck.

programme.title: Yukon Men: The Road
programme.desc: Villagers face a new threat, as outsiders descend on sacred hunting grounds. Charlie and James track a moose and make a disturbing discovery. Stan races to find a new source of fresh water after a vital spring dries up.

programme.title: Yukon Men: Bloodlines
programme.desc: Charlie clears trail along a treacherous stretch of the Yukon, with help from his daughter's new boyfriend. Chris and Jessi hatch a plan to hunt with homemade weapons. Pat's wife Lorene is rushed to a hospital in Fairbanks for emergency surgery.

programme.title: Movie: Death at a Funeral
programme.desc: Aaron's father's funeral turns into chaos when his extended family arrives. An uncle complains about his daughter's boyfriend, a cousin inadvertently gives her fiancé LSD, and family secrets are revealed.

programme.title: Movie: Lottery Ticket
programme.desc: A young man must survive a long weekend after his neighbours in the projects learn that he has a winning lottery ticket.

programme.title: Movie: Blue Streak
programme.desc: A jewel thief is released from jail and sets out to find his hidden loot. However, when he returns to his hiding spot he finds the area has been turned into a police station and his only shot of recovering the diamonds is to impersonate a detective.

programme.title: Martin: Workin' Day and Night
programme.desc: Stan, Tommy and Cole convince Martin that Gina controls his life. To prove them wrong, he starts working double shifts at the radio station, which is exactly what Gina didn't want.

programme.title: Martin: Control

programme.title: Martin: You've Got a Friend

programme.desc: Dre has always strived to mirror his life after the model families he grew up watching on TV. When news spreads that Stevens & Lido is going through layoffs, Dre panics that his family's reputation will be tarnished if he loses his job.

programme.title: Meet the Browns: Meet the Dependents and the Divas

programme.title: Fixer Upper: Flip House to Family Project

programme.title: Fixer Upper: A European Cottage-Style Dream Home With a View
programme.desc: Chip and Jo's latest clients are looking for a house with a view and plenty of room for their grandkids to play. After a frustrating house hunt, Chip and Jo come up with a creative plan that will give them the home of their dreams.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Can't See the House From the Trees
programme.desc: Tamara tackles a Colonial-style home with a yard that's been seriously neglected. She must tame the overgrown grounds before putting traditional Kansas City charm into the interior with a brand-new kitchen and main suite.

programme.title: Fixer Upper: Flip House to Family Project
programme.desc: Chip and Jo return to their roots and work to give a home a clean, new look, until Jo decides she wants her sister and brother-in-law to buy the house.

programme.title: Fixer Upper: A European Cottage-Style Dream Home With a View
programme.desc: Chip and Jo's latest clients are looking for a house with a view and plenty of room for their grandkids to play. After a frustrating house hunt, Chip and Jo come up with a creative plan that will give them the home of their dreams.

programme.title: Fixer Upper: A Downtown Loft Challenge for Chip And Jo

programme.title: Fixer Upper: A Host and Hostess for the Bed and Breakfast
programme.desc: Chip and Jo renovate an innkeeper's house for the B&B managers.
